## Why is an existing prompt insufficient?
<!-- Which existing prompt did you try and what was missing? -->

## Key questions this prompt should answer
<!-- List 3–5 questions that are specific to this type and not covered elsewhere -->

## Estimated audience
<!-- Who would use this prompt? How common is this project type? -->
